alias.name: NAT_INTERNET
alias.descr: NAT LAN and DMZ in internet

package.name: FRR
package.descr: FRR routing daemon for BGP, OSPF, OSPF6 and RIP.<br /> <strong>Conflicts with Quagga OSPF and OpenBGPD; these packages cannot be installed at the same time.</strong>

package.name: pfBlockerNG
snort
package.descr: Snort is an open source network intrusion prevention and detection system (IDS/IPS). Combining the benefits of signature, protocol, and anomaly-based inspection.
package.after_install_info: Please visit Services - Snort - Interfaces tab first and select your desired rules. Afterwards visit the Updates tab to download your configured rulesets.

package.name: suricata
package.descr: High Performance Network IDS, IPS and Security Monitoring engine by OISF.

package.name: Telegraf
package.descr: Telegraf is an agent written in Go for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics.

package.name: haproxy
acme
package.descr: Automated Certificate Management Environment, for automated use of LetsEncrypt certificates.

package.name: OpenVPN Client Export Utility
package.descr: Allows a pre-configured OpenVPN Windows Client or Mac OS X's Viscosity configuration bundle to be exported directly from pfSense.

rule.eve_log_http_extended_headers: accept, accept-charset, accept-datetime, accept-encoding, accept-language, accept-range, age, allow, authorization, cache-control, connection, content-encoding, content-language, content-length, content-location, content-md5, content-range, content-type, cookie, date, dnt, etags, from, last-modified, link, location, max-forwards, origin, pragma, proxy-authenticate, proxy-authorization, range, referrer, refresh, retry-after, server, set-cookie, te, trailer, transfer-encoding, upgrade, vary, via, warning, www-authenticate, x-authenticated-user, x-flash-version, x-forwarded-proto, x-requested-with

accept, accept-charset, accept-datetime, accept-encoding, accept-language, accept-range, age, allow, authorization, cache-control, connection, content-encoding, content-language, content-length, content-location, content-md5, content-range, content-type, cookie, date, dnt, etags, from, last-modified, link, location, max-forwards, origin, pragma, proxy-authenticate, proxy-authorization, range, referrer, refresh, retry-after, server, set-cookie, te, trailer, transfer-encoding, upgrade, vary, via, warning, www-authenticate, x-authenticated-user, x-flash-version, x-forwarded-proto, x-requested-with

item.name: passlist
item.descr: Passlist with none block from IPS

config.description: ADs Basic - Collection of ADvertisement Domain Feeds.
PRI1 - Collection of Feeds from the most reputable blocklist providers. (Primary tier)

item.descr: Maximum socket buffer size - set by FRR package
